title: Trump 'I made Netanyahu stop' — Times of Israel liveblog: Israel preparing 'significant attack in Tehran'
snippet: Times of Israel liveblog: Trump claims credit for halting Israeli strikes. Reports indicate Israel was preparing a 'significant attack in Tehran' when Trump's call came. Trump then claimed 'I made Netanyahu stop.'
tag_reason: Same story as src-1655 — Times of Israel liveblog adds detail that Israel was preparing 'significant attack in Tehran'
